buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-600 to-red-600 hover:from-orange-500 hover:to-red-500 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,87,34,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 font-bold tracking-wide uppercase text-sm px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-orange-500/30 hover:bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-100 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-300

cards.style: bg-[#1c0d08]/80 border border-orange-900/30 backdrop-blur-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-orange-500/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-black/40 border-orange-900/50 focus:border-orange-500/80 text-orange-50 placeholder:text-orange-900/60 rounded-xl p-4 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500/50 transition-all

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-orange-900/30 z-50 flex justify-around items-center p-4 safe-area-pb

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

voice.visualizer: Central pulsing orb that reacts to volume level

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run `yarn add framer-motion react-speech-recognition lucide-react sonner clsx tailwind-merge`.
2. SETUP FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to `public/index.html` immediately.
3. TAILWIND CONFIG: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the specific colors (obsidian, ember, agni) defined in this JSON. Do not rely on default colors.
4. GLOBAL CSS: Add the grain texture overlay to the `body` in `index.css`.
5. VOICE ORB: Create a dedicated `VoiceOrb` component that animates based on `listening` state.
6. HINDI SUPPORT: Ensure the `font-family-hindi` is applied whenever the language is switched to Hindi.
7. IMAGE GEN: Use a placeholder or mock API for image generation if a real backend isn't provided, but style the gallery with 'masonry' layout.
8. NO PURPLE/TEAL: Strictly avoid these colors. Use Orange/Red/Gold only.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all buttons, inputs, and major sections.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
